utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution contains all six of these items. Each one is fully detailed: the 'property' includes address, type, bedrooms, bathrooms, price, condition, and features; 'financing' includes lender, product, approved_amount, down_payment, rate, term, amortization, monthly_payment_estimate, and prepayment_options; 'legal_services' includes provider, package, base_fee, title_search, disbursements, and closing_costs_total; 'moving_services' includes provider, estimated_cost, includes list, and insurance; 'setup_services' includes multiple utilities with providers, setup fees, monthly costs, and smart home integration; 'total_budget' provides a full cost breakdown with all relevant totals and notes. Therefore, all 6 required items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a property purchase at 145 Logan Avenue, Leslieville, Toronto, ON — a 3-bedroom renovated townhouse priced at CAD $800,000. Looking at the ground-truth purchase property list, the closest match by type, price, and features (townhouse, garden, workshop, family-friendly) is 'Historic Townhouse' (CAD $750K, rating 6). The financing solution used 'Traditional Mortgage', which directly maps to the 'Traditional Mortgage' option in purchase_financing with a rating of 9. The legal services package is 'legal-basic-001', which aligns best with 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 8). The moving provider is 'Toronto Premier Movers', described as a full-service mover with fragile item handling and insurance, which fits the 'Premium Moving' category (rating 9). The setup_services package includes both utilities and smart home integration, aligning with 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9) and 'Smart Home Package' (rating 10). Since both are combined in one package, we include both ratings.
